pkgmetadata.longdescription: This library consists of a DSL for piecing together drum compositions. It uses a MIDI backend and is only currently available for use on Mac OSX. Much of the library was inspired by previous work done by Yale's @<http://haskell.cs.yale.edu/euterpea/ Euterpea>@ project and Paul Hudak\'s @<http://cpsc.yale.edu/sites/default/files/files/tr1259.pdf paper>@.
